scenario: Layer dependency violation: domain layer imports from infrastructure

input.rules_md_constraints: LAYER_RULE: Domain layer MUST NOT import Infrastructure layer

expected_behavior: Skill must load RULES.md and detect layer crossing violation at src/domain/user-service.ts. Report: '🔴 CRITICAL: Layer violation at src/domain/user-service.ts:3 — domain layer imports infrastructure.DatabaseConnection. Violates RULES.md LAYER_RULE.' BLOCK handoff to /s5-pr-review. Do NOT auto-fix architectural violations.
notes: Forbidden crossings are architectural red lines. User decision required to fix via refactoring or rule change.

scenario: API contract mismatch: endpoint schema differs from design doc

input.design_spec: request: { name: string, email: string, age: integer } response: { id: uuid, created_at: timestamp }
input.implementation: request: { name: string, email: string } response: { id: uuid }

expected_behavior: Skill must verify implementation matches every endpoint schema in design doc exactly. Report: '🔴 CRITICAL: API contract mismatch at POST /api/users — missing 'age' field in request (design doc requires it). Missing 'created_at' field in response.' BLOCK handoff until contract is corrected.
notes: Design doc is the source of truth. Code must match it exactly, not the other way around.

scenario: Naming compliance: public identifiers match domain glossary

input.context_md_glossary: User domain terminology: 'User', 'Profile', 'Account' — use these consistently
input.violation: mixed terminology (User vs Account vs Info)

expected_behavior: Skill must check CONTEXT.md for domain glossary. Report violations: '🔴 CRITICAL: Naming inconsistency at src/api/routes.ts:12 — function 'getUserInfo' violates glossary. Use 'fetchUserProfile' (User domain term) consistently.' List all naming deviations by file:line.
notes: Consistent naming prevents conceptual drift. Glossary violations are CRITICAL.

scenario: File scope compliance: only task-scoped files modified
expected_behavior: Skill must load TASK_DAG.md and verify only listed files were modified. Report: '🔴 CRITICAL: Scope violation — file src/utils/helpers.ts was modified but is NOT in TASK-7 scope. Task scope is: [auth-routes.ts, auth-service.ts, auth.test.ts].' BLOCK handoff. Instruct: revert extra files or document scope change with PM approval.
notes: Scope creep violates task boundaries. Even small utility file changes outside scope are violations.

expected_behavior: Skill must report: 'DONE — zero architectural violations detected. All API contracts match design doc. Naming aligned with domain glossary. File scope verified. Proceeding to /s5-pr-review.'
notes: Clean audit shows all architectural rules respected. Proceed to next stage only after zero violations confirmed.

expected_behavior: Skill must attempt to load design doc. If missing or stale (>90 days), report: 'NEEDS_CONTEXT: design document docs/arch/2026-05-18-payment-design.md not found or outdated. Cannot verify API contracts without current architecture spec.' BLOCK and instruct: 'PM must update or create design doc before audit can proceed.'
notes: Design doc is mandatory baseline. Missing design docs block the audit.
